description_long: This bird features a vibrant plumage with a turquoise-blue head and underparts, transitioning to a bright yellow-green collar and back. The wings and upper back are predominantly dark, with patches of green and yellow, and a hint of orange near the shoulders. Its beak is short and conical, blending into the head with a subtle curve. The tail is moderately long and appears straight with a slight taper, matching the blue and green hues of the body. The legs are short and grayish, partially visible beneath the body. The overall appearance is striking, with a mix of iridescent and matte feather textures.
description: A small, vividly colored bird with turquoise-blue, yellow-green, and dark plumage, featuring a short conical beak and a straight, tapered tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the turquoise head, yellow-green collar, blue underparts, and dark wings with green highlights.
description_view_1: Rear view emphasizing the dark back, yellow-green collar, and the straight alignment of the tail feathers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the same color transitions, with a visible orange patch on the wing and the beak profile.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the turquoise head, short beak, and the symmetry of the plumage pattern across the chest.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Iridescent turquoise head and underparts, yellow-green collar and back, dark wings with green and orange patches, and a blue-tinted tail.
